title: Assigning high privileges Azure Resource Manager built-in roles is security-sensitive
description: This rule raises an issue when one of the following roles is assigned: Contributor (b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c) Owner (8e3af657-a8ff-443c-a75c-2fe8c4bcb635) User Access Administrator (18d7d88d-d35e-4fb5-a5c3-7773c20a72d9) The user, group, or service principal doesn’t use the entirety of this extensive set of permissions to operate on a day-to-day basis. It is possible to follow the Separation of Duties principle and split permissions between multiple users, but it’s not enforced. There is a risk if you answered yes to any of these questions.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
